socialpostsv1Author.description: The author of a blog post.

id.description: Output only. The id of the author.

name.description: Output only. The name of the author.

socialpostsv1Author.title: Author

v1BlogPostCustomization.description: Blog post-specific customization options, including author, categories, and tags.

categories.description: Output only. The categories of the blog post.

siteType.description: Output only. The site type of the blog post.

tags.description: Output only. The tags of the blog post.

v1BlogPostCustomization.title: BlogPostCustomization

v1CallToAction.description: A call-to-action button associated with a Google My Business social post.

url.description: Output only. The URL for the CTA.

v1CallToAction.title: CallToAction

businessId.title: The business to delete the social post for

socialPostId.title: The post id that going to delete

v1Error.description: Describes the reason and category of an error that occurred while scheduling or posting.

category.description: Output only. The category of the error.

reason.description: Output only. The reason for the error.

v1Error.title: Error

v1Event.description: An event associated with a Google My Business social post.

endDatetime.description: Output only. The end timestamp of the event.

startDatetime.description: Output only. The start timestamp of the event.

title.description: Output only. The title of the event.

v1Event.title: Event

businessId.title: The business to list the social posts for

cursor.title: A cursor that can be provided to retrieve the next page of results

end.title:
If an end time is provided, a page of the posts older than it will be
returned If an end time of the current date time is provided you will not
get any posts that are scheduled to be posted

partnerId.title: The partner the social posts belong to

socialServiceIds.title: A list of social service IDs to request posts for

start.title:
If a start time is provided, a page of the posts that are newer than it
will be returned If a start time of the current date time is provided you
will get a page of posts that are scheduled to be posted

tags.title: A list of tags to request posts for

hasMore.title: Whether or not more results exist

nextCursor.title: A cursor that can be provided to retrieve the next page of results

v1MediaEntry.description: A single media item (image, video, etc.) attached to a social post.

containerId.description: Output only. The container identifier, if the network requires it.

mediaEntryId.description: Output only. The unique identifier of this media entry.

mediaPath.description: Output only. The storage path of the media.

mediaType.description: Output only. The MIME type or classification of the media (e.g. image, video).

mediaUrl.description: Output only. The URL where the media is hosted.

metaData.description: Output only. Metadata associated with this media entry.

v1MediaEntry.title: MediaEntry

v1MetaData.description: A key-value pair of metadata associated with a social post or media entry.

propertyName.description: Required. The name of the metadata property.

propertyValue.description: Required. The value of the metadata property.

v1MetaData.title: MetaData

v1SocialCampaign.description: Campaign details associated with a social post.

id.description: Output only. The unique ID of the campaign.

name.description: Output only. The name of the campaign.

v1SocialCampaign.title: SocialCampaign

v1SocialPost.description: Represents a social media post, including its content, scheduling, status, and metadata.

brandId.description: Output only. A unique identifier for a brand (if this is a multilocation post).

businessId.description: Output only. The unique identifier of the business this post is related to.

created.description:
Output only. The date time that this entity was created in our system (not the time that
it was posted).

createdBy.description:
Output only. Identifier of who created this post.
In automation flow it will be an assistant ID.
In chat flow it will be a user ID.

imageUrl.description: Output only. The image URL posted.

imageUrls.description: Output only. A list of image URLs for this post.

isError.description: Output only. Whether the post encountered an error during posting.

linkPreviewImageUrl.description: Output only. An image that appears as a preview to a URL link.

mediaEntries.description: Output only. Array of media content when uploading multiple media.

metaData.description: Output only. Metadata about the media.

multilocationPostId.description: Output only. A unique identifier if this is a multilocation post.

name.description: Output only. The name of the social account (may not always be populated).

parentId.description: Output only. The correlation id for posts that have been posted as a group.

permalink.description: Output only. The link to the post on the social page (e.g. an actual link to Facebook).

postText.description: Output only. The text content of the post.

posted.description:
Output only. The date time that this post was posted to its corresponding social
account.

profileImageUrl.description: Output only. The profile image URL of the social account that posted.

profileUrl.description: Output only. The profile URL of the social account that posted.

scheduled.description:
Output only. The date time that this post is scheduled to be posted. If it's in the past
that means we have or are attempting to post this. You can see if it was
successful based on the status.

socialPostId.description: Output only. The unique identifier of this social post.

socialServiceId.description: Output only. The id of the social service this post was created with.

title.description: Output only. The title of the post.

updatedBy.description:
Output only. Identifier of who last updated this post. Empty until the first
update, then overwritten on every subsequent update.
In automation flow it will be an assistant ID.
In chat flow it will be a user ID.

username.description: Output only. The username of the social account (may not always be populated).

videoUrl.description: Output only. The video URL posted.

v1SocialPost.title: SocialPost

v1TikTokCustomization.description: TikTok-specific options for video posts, including community interaction and branding settings.

allowComment.description: Output only. Whether viewers can comment on the video. Default: true for public engagement.

allowDuet.description: Output only. Whether other users can create duet videos (side-by-side reactions).

allowStitch.description: Output only. Whether other users can stitch/use clips from this video in their content.

isBrandOrganic.description:
Output only. Whether this is organic brand content (not paid promotion).
REQUIRED by TikTok. Set to true for regular business posts, false for paid advertising.

isBrandedContent.description:
Output only. Whether this video contains branded content or product placement.
REQUIRED by TikTok. Set to true if showcasing products/services, false for general content.

v1TikTokCustomization.title: TikTokCustomization

v1YoutubeCustomization.description: YouTube-specific customization options for video posts, including title and privacy settings.

title.description: Output only. Title of the YouTube video.

v1YoutubeCustomization.title: YoutubeCustomization

v1YoutubeCustomizationPrivacyStatus.description:
- YOUTUBE_PRIVACY_STATUS_PUBLIC: Video is visible to everyone on YouTube and can appear in search results.
Use this for public content meant to reach a wide audience.
 - YOUTUBE_PRIVACY_STATUS_PRIVATE: Video is only visible to the owner and cannot be shared or found in search.
Use this for videos that should not be accessible to anyone else.
 - YOUTUBE_PRIVACY_STATUS_UNLISTED: Video can be viewed by anyone with the direct link but won't appear in search results
or on the channel page. Use this for semi-private sharing (e.g., sharing with clients).

publicUrl.title: The public url of the image

createdBy.description:
Identifier of who created this blog post.
In automation flow it will be an assistant ID.
In chat flow it will be a user ID.

error.title: Holds the error message from blog

metadata.title: Key/value metadata associated with the blog post (e.g. assistant_type, workflow_type, workflow_source)

updatedBy.description:
Identifier of who last updated this blog post. Empty until the first
update, then overwritten on every subsequent update.
In chat flow it will be a user ID.

publicUrl.title: The public url of the video

v2LinkV2.description: Link preview information associated with a social post, including URL, title, and preview image.

description.description: Optional. The description of the link.

name.description: Optional. The name of the link preview.

picture.description: Optional. The preview image associated with the link.

shortcode.description: Optional. The shortcode of the link.

title.description: Optional. The title for the link.

url.description: Required. The URL of the link.

v2LinkV2.title: LinkV2

businessId.title: The business id of the account

publicUrl.title: Public Url for the blog media

v2MetadataV2.description: A key-value pair used to store generic metadata information associated with a post or media.

name.description: Required. The property name or key.

value.description: Required. The property value associated with the name/key.

v2MetadataV2.title: MetadataV2

v2PostActionV2.description: A call-to-action (CTA) associated with a social post.

linkUrl.description: Required. The link URL where the CTA will lead to.

type.description: Required. The type of the CTA (e.g. LEARN_MORE, BOOK, SHOP).

v2PostActionV2.title: PostActionV2

v2PostContentV2.description: Contains all the content of a social post including text, media attachments, and links.

description.description: Optional. Description for the post, used specifically for LinkedIn.

links.description: Optional. Link previews associated with the post.

medias.description: Optional. All media associated with the post (images, videos, etc.).

postText.description: Required. The text content of the post.

title.description: Optional. Title for the post. Not required for all social networks.

v2PostContentV2.title: PostContentV2

v2PostCustomizationV2.description: Extra configurations for a social post, including events and call-to-action settings.
v2PostCustomizationV2.title: PostCustomizationV2

v2PostEventV2.description: An event associated with a social post, typically used for Google My Business event posts.

end.description: Required. The timestamp when the event will end.

start.description: Required. The timestamp when the event will start.

title.description: Required. Title of the event related to the post.

v2PostEventV2.title: PostEventV2

v2PostMediaV2.description: A single media attachment (image, video, etc.) associated with a social post.

containerId.description: Optional. The container identifier, if the network requires it.

mediaId.description: Optional. Identifier for this media item.

mediaType.description: Required. Type of the media: 'IMAGE' or 'VIDEO', etc.

mediaUrl.description: Required. The URL where the media is stored.

metadata.description: Optional. Metadata associated with this media item.

v2PostMediaV2.title: PostMediaV2

v2PostStatusV2.title: Represents the status of a post

v2PostTypeV2.title: Represents the type of a post

businessId.title: The business id of the blog post connection

categories.title: The categories of the blog post

content.title: The content of the blog post

createdBy.description:
Identifier of who created this blog post.
In automation flow it will be an assistant ID.
In chat flow it will be a user ID.

images.title: The images of the blog post

internalPostId.title: The internal post id of the blog post

metadata.title: Key/value metadata associated with the blog post (e.g. assistant_type, workflow_type, workflow_source)

partnerId.title: The partner id of the blog post

postDateTime.title: The post date time of the blog post

postTags.title: The post tags of the blog post

siteType.title: The site type of the blog post

socialServiceId.title: The service id of the connection

tags.title: The tags of the blog post

title.title: The title of the blog post

userId.title: The user id of the blog post

userName.title: The user name of the blog post

videos.title: The videos of the blog post

metadata.title: Contains metadata if any associated with the post

statusMessage.title: A message related to the post. Can be the error message in case of an error status, for example

v2SocialPostOutput.title: Contains all the information of a post plus internal identifier and metadata

socialPosts.title: List of posts to be created and scheduled

v2SocialPostRequest.title: The complete request of the ScheduleSocialPosts RPC

socialPosts.title: List of the created/scheduled posts containing internal identifiers

v2SocialPostResponse.title: The complete response of the ScheduleSocialPosts RPC

v2SocialPostV2.description: Represents a social media post including its content, scheduling, customization, and metadata.

brandId.description: Optional. The brand_id related to this post (multilocation only).

businessId.description: Required. The business id that owns this post.

campaignId.description: Optional. Campaign ID, used to store control social posts for a campaign.

createdBy.description:
Output only. Identifier of who created this post.
In automation flow it will be an assistant ID.
In chat flow it will be a user ID.

internalPostId.description: Output only. Internal post id, used as a fail-safe identifier.

metadata.description: Optional. Metadata to hold any additional details related to the post.

multilocationPostId.description: Optional. The multilocation post id related to this post (multilocation only).

partnerId.description: Required. The partner_id of the business_id for this post.

scheduled.description: Optional. The time to schedule the post at. If not provided, the post will be published immediately.

shareId.description: Optional. The share ID, used for TikTok posts.

socialServiceId.description: Required. Social service id representing the specific network. Indicates the network in which the post will be published.

updatedBy.description:
Output only. Identifier of who last updated this post. Empty until the first
update, then overwritten on every subsequent update.
In automation flow it will be an assistant ID.
In chat flow it will be a user ID.

userId.description: Optional. The user ID, used for TikTok posts.

v2SocialPostV2.title: SocialPostV2

clientTags.description: Tags associated with the client, eg: "SM", "RM", etc.

fullName.title: For Twitter, this will be the User display name, otherwise this will be same as the name

isSyncing.title: Whether the service is currently syncing

name.title: For Twitter, this will be the Twitter handle, otherwise this will be just the name

serviceType.description: Type of the social service, eg: TW_USER, FB_PAGE, LI_COMPANY, etc.

socialTokenBroken.title: Whether the social token is broken

v2TikTokCustomizationV2.description: TikTok-specific customization options for video posts, including community interaction and branding settings.

allowComment.description: Optional. Whether viewers can comment on the video.

allowDuet.description: Optional. Whether other users can create duet videos.

allowStitch.description: Optional. Whether other users can stitch clips from this video.

isBrandOrganic.description: Optional. Whether this is organic brand content (not paid promotion).

isBrandedContent.description: Optional. Whether this video contains branded content or product placement.

v2TikTokCustomizationV2.title: TikTokCustomizationV2

v2YoutubeCustomizationV2.description: YouTube-specific customization options for video posts, including privacy settings.
v2YoutubeCustomizationV2.title: YoutubeCustomizationV2

scopes.business-app: Allows the application to manage all features of Business App
